monitor.capture_what: The file path argument passed to open() at the sink in postprocess_image

oracle_check.condition_description: The path argument to open() contains path traversal sequences ('../') or is an absolute path pointing outside the cache directory, indicating arbitrary file read exploitation
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PATH_INJECTION: Arbitrary file read via unsanitized path in postprocess_image — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

fuzz_guidance.skip_condition: not isinstance(value, (str, Path)) or (isinstance(value, str) and not value)

_meta.function_signature: def postprocess_image(format: str, value: np.ndarray | PIL.Image.Image | str | Path | None, cache_dir: str, watermark: WatermarkOptions | None)
